task: Can you help me write a short message to my coach about being late to practice one day this week? I want it to sound respectful, but not long or fancy.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, respectful message you could send:

“Hi Coach, I wanted to let you know I may be a little late to practice one day this week. I’ll do my best to get there as soon as I can. Thanks for understanding.”

If you want, I can also make it sound more casual or more formal.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and respectful. I’d probably use that.
